name: Web Search
description: Real-time web search with AI summaries. Uses Tavily for AI-enhanced results; falls back to Brave Search. Includes page fetch and content extraction.

capabilities: Search the public web for any topic
Fetch and extract content from specific URLs
scope.note: Queries and URLs leave your device. No personal data is included. Having both keys enables automatic fallback.

keys.label: Tavily API Key
keys.get_key_instructions: Sign up free at app.tavily.com → API Keys → Create key

keys.label: Brave Search API Key
keys.get_key_instructions: Register at api.search.brave.com → Subscriptions → Free tier available

installer.scope_summary: Searches the live web using Tavily and/or Brave. Queries and URLs leave your device.
